overview: The backend todo-api has no dependencies and must be implemented first to expose endpoints consumed by the frontend. The todo-web SPA depends on todo-api and is built in phase 2.

phases.name: Backend API Foundation
phases.description: Implement the Go REST API providing authentication, tasks, and categories — the foundation the frontend depends on.

components.name: todo-api
responsibilities: Provide JWT-based authentication (register, login, logout, password reset, account update) with bcrypt hashing
Expose authenticated CRUD endpoints for tasks with filtering, search, and completion toggling
Expose CRUD endpoints for user-scoped categories, unassigning them from tasks on delete
Enforce per-user data isolation, input validation, rate limiting, and login lockout
Persist data concurrently-safely and expose /health for liveness
components.architectureContext: Core backend service on port 9090 consumed over HTTPS/JSON by the todo-web SPA. It owns all persistence, auth, and business logic; no upstream dependencies.
keyConsiderations: Use sync.RWMutex (or SQLite) for concurrent-safe store supporting <500ms list retrieval up to 1000 tasks
JWT 24h expiry with inactivity handling; bcrypt cost tuned for responsiveness
Enforce 100 req/min/user rate limit and 5-failure/15min -> 30min lockout
CORS configuration to allow the SPA origin; sanitize all inputs
Daily backup routine and graceful shutdown to avoid data loss
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /auth/register:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties: {email: {type: string}, password: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '201': {description: Created}
  /auth/login:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties: {email: {type: string}, password: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /auth/logout:
    post:
      responses:
        '204': {description: No Content}
  /auth/password-reset:
    post:
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties: {email: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '202': {description: Accepted}
  /account:
    put:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /tasks:
    get:
      parameters:
        - {name: category, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
        - {name: status, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
        - {name: dateRange, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
        - {name: q, in: query, schema: {type: string}}
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    post:
      responses:
        '201': {description: Created}
  /tasks/{id}:
    get:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    put:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    delete:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '204': {description: No Content}
  /tasks/{id}/complete:
    post:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
  /categories:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    post:
      responses:
        '201': {description: Created}
  /categories/{id}:
    put:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
    delete:
      parameters: [{name: id, in: path, required: true, schema: {type: string}}]
      responses:
        '204': {description: No Content}

phases.name: Frontend SPA
phases.description: Build the React SPA that consumes the backend API once available.

components.name: todo-web
responsibilities: Provide Login, Register, Password Reset, Dashboard, Task Edit, Categories, and Account pages
Perform task/category CRUD, completion toggling, filtering, search, and sorting against todo-api
Persist filter/sort across navigation and retain user input on network errors
Highlight overdue/due-today tasks and show toast confirmations within 2s
Redirect unauthenticated users to login and serve /health via nginx
components.architectureContext: Responsive React SPA served by nginx that calls todo-api over HTTPS/JSON using a JWT in Authorization headers. It is the sole client of todo-api.
keyConsiderations: Centralize API client with JWT injection, 401 handling, and error surfacing
Use localStorage or URL params to preserve filters/sort across navigation
Client-side validation mirroring backend limits (title ≤200, description ≤2000, category ≤50)
Configurable API base URL via env at container start (nginx template)
Accessible, responsive layout covering desktop and mobile breakpoints
components.apiContract:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Todo Web
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      responses:
        '200': {description: OK}
